MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered defendant Paul M. Carey dismissed with prejudice at the request of counsel for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to June 19, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
